description: Create a GitLab CI pipeline with a single stage unit-test using the ubuntu Docker image. Add a unit-test job that runs in the unit-test stage and executes the following shell commands in order: apt-get update; apt-get -y install curl; apt-get -y install python3; apt-get -y install python3-distutils; curl -sS "https://bootstrap.pypa.io/get-pip.py" | python3; pip3 install nose; pip3 install coverage; pip3 install python-dateutil; python3 --version; nosetests --with-coverage --with-xunit --cover-html; ls. The job should publish nosetests.xml and the cover directory as artifacts and record coverage using the regex /TOTAL.+ ([0-9]{1,3}%)/.
